default: Welcome to the Newham Citizen`s Science Fair 2026!
I'm a PhotoSYNTH...
A SMILE POWERED SYNTHESIZER =D
Smile or open your mouth to begin!
Pose like your favourite emoji for new sounds
Tilt your head to change notes and octaves
Scan the QR code on the right to continue playing on your own device

instructions: Let's play a face game together. What face do you make when someone gives you a big cuddle?
What face do you make when your friend makes you laugh so much your cheeks wobble?
What face do you make when you find your favourite snack hiding in your bag?
What face do you make when you hear a very funny noise behind you?
What face do you make when you get a shiny sticker just for you?
What face do you make when someone says surprise and you were not expecting it?
What face do you make when you get to jump right into a giant puddle?
What face do you make when you build a very tall tower and it stands up perfectly?
What face do you make when you smell something yummy floating through the air?
What face do you make when you drop your ice cream on the ground?
What face do you make when it starts raining just when you want to play outside?
What face do you make when you lose your teddy and can't remember where it went?
What face do you make when someone says it's time to tidy up all the toys?
What face do you make when your very tall tower wobbles and falls down?
What face do you make when you taste something really yucky by mistake?
What face do you make when your socks feel all wet and squishy?
What face do you make when you can't find your shoe and everyone is waiting?
What face do you make when you are waiting and waiting and waiting for your turn?
What face do you make when someone takes your toy without asking first?
What face do you make when you are trying not to laugh but the giggles keep coming?
What face do you make when someone shares with you and it feels really kind?
What face do you make when someone won't share and you feel grumpy about it?
What face do you make when you hear your favourite song and want to bounce along?
What face do you make when you are pretending to be a grumpy bear in a cave?
What face do you make when you are surprised and your eyebrows jump up high?
What face do you make when you feel really sleepy and your eyes want to close?
What face do you make when you are sleepy but trying to stay awake just a bit longer?
What face do you make when you see a dog much bigger than you expected?
What face do you make when a monkey steals your banana and runs away with it?
What face do you make when you see the biggest cake in the whole world?
What face do you make when a feather tickles your nose and you are about to sneeze?
What face do you make when you are a king or queen sitting proudly on a grand throne?
What face do you make when you are a dragon trying very hard not to sneeze fire?
What face do you make when you are a lion with a sore paw trying to look brave?

default: Welcome to the Newham Citizen`s
Science Fair 2026!
I'm a PhotoSYNTH...
A SMILE POWERED SYNTHESIZER =D
Accessible musical instrument
(and super pop video machine!)
Part of the Accessible Musical Instrument Collection
Smile or open your mouth to begin!
Change instruments and video effects by posing...
like your favourite emoji =P
Each expression will change the sound
Be fond and show your affection
For beautiful VFX
and remixed visuals
Tilt, twist and bend your neck
to change between notes and octaves
Your job is to make some beautiful music!
Things are definitely more fun with friends
And far more musical and interesting too!
Scan the QR code on the right to continue playing on your own device
And carry on the fun at home!
Or you can go to interface.place
Or photosynth.app to learn more.
